app.similarity.similarity¶

class app.similarity.similarity.ComputeSimilarity(dataset: Dataset, parameters: dict | None = None, *args, **kwargs)¶

Compute the similarity between images inside a dataset

check_parameters(parameters)¶

Return True if all the parameters are the same (meaning that the similarity has already been computed) False if one of the parameters is not the same

compute_cosine_similarity(features: ndarray, topk: int = 20, n_transpositions: int = 1) → BlockSimMatrix¶

Compute pairwise cosine similarities between feature vectors, optionally handling transpositions.

Parameters:

  • features – Feature vectors of shape (n_samples * n_transpositions, n_features)

  • topk – Number of most similar matches to return per vector

  • n_transpositions – Number of consecutive features representing the same image

Returns:

A BlockSimMatrix object with the similarity scores, grouped by pairs of documents

compute_segswap_similarity(source_images: List[str], input_pairs: BlockSimMatrix, cos_topk, device='cuda') → BlockSimMatrix¶

Compute the similarity between pairs of images using the SegSwap algorithm

Parameters:

  • source_images (List[str]) – The list of image paths

  • input_pairs (BlockSimMatrix) – The input pairs of documents

  • cos_topk (int) – The number of best matches to return

  • device (str) – The device to run the computation on

Returns:

A list of pairs (k_i, k_j, sim, tr_i, tr_j)

compute_similarity() → SimilarityResults¶

Compute the similarity between images in the dataset and returns the results

format_results(pairs: Iterable[Tuple[Tuple[DocInRange, int], Tuple[DocInRange, int], Tuple[float, int, int]]]) → SimilarityResults¶

Format the results for output

Parameters:

pairs (Iterable[Pair]) – The similarity pairs

Returns:

A dictionary with the document index and pairs

get_doc_uid(idx: int) → str¶

Get the document UID for an image index.

get_features(img_paths: List[str])¶

Extract features from a list of images

run_task()¶

🚫 Try/Except block should only be implemented in run_task() and not in sub-functions in order to catch most relevant exceptions and send them to the frontend

skip(uid1: str, uid2: str) → bool¶

Check if this pair should be skipped (explicitly listed by the front)

store(matrix: SparseDocSimMatrix, algorithm='cosine')¶

Store similarity pairs for a document pair and sends results to front

class app.similarity.similarity.DocIndex¶
class app.similarity.similarity.SimParameters¶
class app.similarity.similarity.SimilarityResults¶
